title: user defined connection parameters passed as variables to Ext. tool
author: Bjelko
body_snippet: Hi. I have 200+ MSSQL servers with different  instances, different users, passwords. It would be good to have possibilty to add some user defined parameters for connection not just predefined like %hostname% %password%... and then pass/send it to external tools like %param1% %param2% or so... Thanks in advance

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and no reproduction steps or feature specification provided; triage comment confirms retest on current build is needed before proceeding.
Wontfix: Custom user-defined variables for External Tools adds complexity — existing %tokens% cover standard use cases

notes: Feature: user-defined connection params as variables for External Tools. Requires variable substitution engine.
